name: Peppy Beef Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook ground beef until browned. Drain well.
2. Return the cooked beef to the skillet. Stir in 3/4 cup picante sauce and cumin or chili powder. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
3. If necessary, warm the tortillas in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 5 minutes to soften them.
4. Spoon the beef mixture onto one edge of each tortilla and roll up tightly into a jelly-roll shape.
5. Spray a 13x9x2 inch baking dish with nonstick cooking spray. Place the rolled tortillas in the dish, tucking the ends if needed.
6. Pour the remaining 1/2 cup picante sauce evenly over the tortillas and sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese on top.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the tortillas are heated through.
8. Serve and enjoy.
